text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, December 25. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Planning for future education costs. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
